name: Runtime Change

---

## Summary

Describe the proposed Hermes plugin change.

## Motivation

Explain the implementation or operator problem this solves.

## Affected Behavior

- [ ] Runtime identity or metadata
- [ ] Pairing
- [ ] Device trust state
- [ ] Session or resume
- [ ] Agent discovery or dispatch
- [ ] Transfer or artifact handling
- [ ] Dashboard/admin routes
- [ ] Local state or configuration

## Protocol Impact

Explain whether this requires a protocol change. If it does, update
`ripdock-protocol` first.

## Security And Privacy Impact

Describe changes to Runtime identity, private keys, Device trust, Pairing,
Session resume, authorization, replay prevention, logging, transfers, or
artifacts.

## Validation

List tests or manual validation that should cover this change.

## Alternatives

Describe alternatives considered, including why this should be Hermes plugin
behavior rather than protocol behavior.
